content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.25%, Bank Nifty -1.08%, PSU Bank -2.01% — banking weakness dominant. Power/Energy/Pharma showing pockets of strength. VIX at 17.86 elevated. Book is 45% deployed with seven CNC positions; rolling 5-day win rate is only 14% with profit factor 0.4x — strong signal to manage existing book aggressively rather than add new exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23990,
      "nifty_resistance": 24180
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+5.8% unrealized winner. Current SL 1025 already locks gains. Tightening to 1030 (just below today's intraday low of 1041 with buffer) protects more profit. Q4 beat thesis intact, MOFSL Buy, asset quality best-in-class. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.6% small loss, well above SL 119 (CMP 123.04). Gold consolidating; geopolitical floor intact. SL has room — no change needed. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1425.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position is at +1.6% but stock is right at 52-week high (1437.90 high vs CMP 1437.70). Current SL 1425 is essentially breakeven+ already. No-op territory — emitting HOLD instead. (Correction: keeping decision as HOLD via position_actions.) Actually keeping SL at 1425 = current; this would be no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.8% but pulling back from intraday high 414. Current SL 407 is essentially at CMP — already tight. Any tightening risks immediate stop-out on noise. Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. Hold SL where it is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1735.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock made intraday high 1763.90 then pulled back to 1746. Current SL 1745 is above entry 1734 — already locked. But MACD bearish crossover and pullback suggest tightening below entry to 1735 (breakeven+1) keeps slightly more room while still locking. Wait — current SL 1745 is TIGHTER than 1735. Cannot loosen SL. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.3% near flat. SL 315 with CMP 319.65 — about 1.5% room. Defensive utility, Q4 May 19. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 463.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stock pulled back from intraday high 473.90 to 468.30 but still above entry 469... actually CMP 466.25 vs entry 469 = -0.6%. Q4 PAT +11% beat. Current SL 461. Tightening to 463 (just below 12:30 candle low 466.10 with buffer, and below pivot 444 still preserves wider zone). Actually 463 vs 461 is only 2 rupees tighter but reduces risk. Worth it given JM Financial Reduce rating and weak relative momentum."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 1025 to 1030 — locks more of the 5.8% gain while leaving room for normal volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Small unrealized loss within tolerance; SL 119 provides adequate buffer."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stock at fresh 52w high. SL 1425 already above entry 1412.94 — locked profit. Any tightening would be no-op or stop-out risk on normal pullback. Let it run toward 1465."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 407 essentially at CMP 407.30 — already extremely tight. Any further tighten triggers near-immediate stop. Q4 May 15 catalyst pending."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1745 already above entry 1734 — breakeven+ locked. MACD bearish crossover but Organon catalyst still digesting. Cannot loosen SL; current level appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Marginal loss, SL 315 gives ~1.5% buffer. Defensive utility heading into May 19 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 463.00,
      "reasoning": "Slight tightening from 461 to 463 reduces downside given JM Reduce rating and intraday fade from highs."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "VBL, NESTLEIND theme (FMCG defensive) and Power cluster strength noted but no new entries today. Power cluster already represented via NTPC + POWERGRID + CESC pending order risk — cannot stack. Pharma rally (DRREDDY, GLENMARK) noted but SUNPHARMA exposure already covers theme. PVRINOX, INTELLECT showing momentum but extended; will reassess on pullbacks. BAJFINANCE has Apr 29 binary earnings event — avoid pre-event entry. PNBHOUSING-priced sector heat in housing finance is sufficient.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 45% deployed across 7 CNC positions with three pending BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still working. If those fill, deployment jumps to ~58%+. Given the rolling 5-day profit factor of 0.4x and 14% win rate, the right disposition is RISK-OFF on new adds. Sector cluster check: NTPC + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER + COALINDIA (energy/power adjacent) + pending PHARMABEES — power/energy cluster is at the limit. CANCEL recommendation worth considering for TATAPOWER pending order if not filled by EOD given cluster concentration. Focus today: trail SLs on winners, preserve capital, no new entries. Daily P&L flat (+0.02%) — discipline holding."
}
